title: region — authorization policies
description: One policy — RegionPolicy — narrows by scope suffix (`.any` / `.tenant` / `.own`). Every tenant member can READ regions in their active tenant (they are a base commercial reference every UI dropdown needs). Only admins + owners can WRITE. The default region has extra guardrails: `CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_REGION` is a hard 409 refusal even for owners; changing the default requires the caller to carry `regions.set_default`.

abilities.scope: resolved via ScopeSuffixResolver — `.tenant` narrows to the caller's active tenant; `.any` unrestricted (platform_admin only). Every tenant role gets `.tenant` by default because regions are UI reference data.
single-row check by suffix. `.tenant` requires the Region's tenant_id to match the caller's active tenant. Tax registration number gated further by `regions.view.tax_registration`.
admin + owner only. Guards egress of `tax_config.registration_number` (confidential per data-classes.json).
admin or owner in the active tenant. Also gated by the `region_slot` entitlement — the observer decrements on create + refuses with RegionQuotaExceeded when the slot is exhausted.

admin or owner. Mutable fields: name, slug, timezone, locale, weekend_days, sort_order, subdivision_code, fiscal_year_start_month. Immutable-after-use: country_code + currency (attempted change refused when any inbound row exists).
admin or owner. Separated from `regions.update` because tax_config mutations are financial-record-generating events + belong under a higher-privilege permission.
owner only. Changing the default region affects invoice calculations for legacy rows — narrow blast radius.
admin or owner. Refused when is_default=true (would block every new membership in the tenant).
admin or owner. Refused when is_default=true (`CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_REGION`) OR when any inbound row references the Region (`REGION_IN_USE`).
admin or owner. Only within the 730-day archived retention window.
owner only. Refused when is_default=true. Refused when any inbound row references. Soft-delete only — hard-delete via PurgeArchivedRegionsJob after retention window.
platform_admin only. Cross-tenant read for support tooling.

public (read-only) — every tenant admin choosing a country_code needs to see the shipped defaults. The platform surface exposes the same JSON at `GET /api/v1/platform/country-defaults` for convenience.
